asimod.name: Mouse Disabler
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: Makes Mass Effect 3 not respond to mouse input. It's very useful with the controller mods because the interfaces for some reason respond to mouse input on the first frame and can interfere with scrolling.

asimod.name: Mouse Disabler
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: Makes Mass Effect 3 not respond to mouse input. It's very useful with the controller mods because the interfaces for some reason respond to mouse input on the first frame and can interfere with scrolling.

asimod.name: Origin MP Status
asimod.author: Erik JS/Mgamerz
asimod.description: Enables Origin to display your game status like some of the newer games. Will display if in SP, MP, MP Lobby, or MP Match, along with the relevant Map/Faction/Difficulty. Currently this will cause 'Away' mode to become unavailable after the game is closed until you restart Origin. This ASI causes the game to load items slower.

asimod.name: Origin MP Status
asimod.author: Erik JS/Mgamerz
asimod.description: Enables Origin to display your game status like some of the newer games. Will display if in SP, MP, MP Lobby, or MP Match, along with the relevant Map/Faction/Difficulty. This version is MUCH MORE STABLE than the v1 version, and should not crash the game.

asimod.name: Origin MP Status
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Enables Mass Effect 3 to report your Map/Faction/Difficulty and current wave in Origin to show other players your current multiplayer match progress.

asimod.name: Client Message Exposer
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: Opens a console at game launch that will output anything that was written to the Client object which is only available in the developer version of the game. Contains some debugging info.

asimod.name: Origin Unlinker
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: Makes the game behave as if all the links to Origin were removed. Origin is still required as the game will not decrypt at startup. Typically used with the Private Server Emulator.

asimod.name: Balance Changes Replacer
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: This plugin will replace the server-side Coalesced (balance changes for MP) with any custom Coalesced you want, as long as your file is named ServerCoalesced.bin, and put in "Mass Effect 3\Binaries\Win32" or "Mass Effect 3\Binaries\Win32\ASI" (the latter path will be ignored if the file is already found in the former). DO NOT USE ANY COALESCED FILE THAT IS NOT BASED ON THE ORIGINAL SERVER ONE - YOU WILL PERMANENTLY BREAK YOUR ONLINE PROFILE. ModMaker mods will automatically use the latter when i

asimod.name: Balance Changes Replacer
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: This plugin will replace the server-side Coalesced (balance changes for MP) with any custom Coalesced you want, as long as your file is named ServerCoalesced.bin, and put in "Binaries\Win32\ASI". ModMaker mods will automatically use the latter when installing a balance changes file. DO NOT USE ANY COALESCED FILE THAT IS NOT BASED ON THE ORIGINAL SERVER ONE.

asimod.name: Balance Changes Replacer
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: This plugin will replace the server-side Coalesced (balance changes for MP) with any custom Coalesced you want, as long as your file is named ServerCoalesced.bin, and put in "Mass Effect 3\Binaries\Win32\ASI". ModMaker mods will automatically use the latter when installing a balance changes file. DO NOT USE ANY COALESCED FILE THAT IS NOT BASED ON THE ORIGINAL SERVER ONE OR YOU RISK PERMANENTLY RUINING YOUR ONLINE PROFILE.

asimod.name: Live TLK Replacer
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: This plugin will replace the server-side TLK (strings file) with any custom TLK you want, as long as your file is named ServerTLK.tlk and put in "Mass Effect 3\Binaries\Win32" or "Mass Effect 3\Binaries\Win32\ASI" (the latter path will be ignored if the file is already found in the former). This file is loaded in both SP and MP.

asimod.name: Allow mutliple ME3 instances
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: Allows you to run multiple copies of the game at once. Can cause significant system strain. Requires special setup, see source code link.

asimod.name: ME3 Logger
asimod.author: Heff/Erik JS
asimod.description: Writes game crash information in specific instances to a text file in the same location as the EXE.

asimod.name: ME3 Logger - Truncating
asimod.author: Heff/Erik JS/Mgamerz
asimod.description: Writes game crash information in specific instances to a text file in the same location as the EXE.

asimod.name: AutoTOC ASI
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Runs AutoTOC for basegame and unpacked DLC every time the game boots.

asimod.name: AutoTOC ASI
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Runs AutoTOC for basegame and unpacked DLC every time the game boots. v2 of this ASI works with ME3Explorer - ME3Tweaks v 4.2.0.1115 to update the in-memory TOC of a running Mass Effect 3 on file save. See the source code link for more information.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to a the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to a the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to a the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with ME3Explorer's Sequence Editor WPF.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Retaliation Glitch Crash Fix
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Disables friend leaderboard job creation, which fixes the "Retaliation glitch" that causes the game to crash at startup if not booted in offline mode. While this is installed, the friends tab of leaderboards will be empty.

asimod.name: 100% Galactic Readiness
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin will set the Galactic Readiness at game startup to 100% in all zones, as well as the overall readiness level. For this plugin to work, you must boot the game with Origin in Online Mode, otherwise the function that is hooked won't be called.

asimod.name: POC Co-Op Campaign: Moving Spawn Points
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Optional part of the Proof of Concept: Co-Op Campaign Mod. This ASI will update spawnpoints before starting a new wave, which will allow enemies to spawn closer to players than the original starting area.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger for ME2
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with ME3Explorer's Sequence Editor WPF.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Function Logger for ME2
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Function logger records all UnrealScript function calls. This is sometimes useful when debugging a crash. Significant game performance degradation will occur - quickly reproduce your crash as disk I/O will be high. Native to native function calls are not recorded by this ASI.

asimod.name: DLC Mod Enabler
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables DLC mod loading for Mass Effect. Requires additional data in the AutoLoad.ini file for DLC mods.

asimod.name: Documents Folder Redirector
asimod.author: Erik JS
asimod.description: This plugin acts like a proxy for the SHGetFolderPathW function from Shell32.dll, making the game use an alternate folder in the place of the current user's Documents folder. See the source code link for more information on how to use this ASI.

asimod.name: Ace Slammer for ME2
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Ace Slammer changes gravity every few seconds, going through a pattern. Gravity will invert, throwing enemies not based on the ground into the sky, after which it will become zero G for a brief moment allowing enemies (or players) to float, before slamming them into the ground with tremendous force and then returning to normal gravity.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: Splash Enabler
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Enables the application boot splash screen for Mass Effect 2.

asimod.name: Splash Enabler
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Enables the application boot splash screen for Mass Effect 3.

asimod.name: Garbage Collection Forcer
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: Forces the garbage collector to run more often in certain areas of Mass Effect 3. Read the source code page for information about how and when to use this ASI.

asimod.name: Kasumi DLC Crash Fix
asimod.author: Federico Dossena
asimod.description: This ASI mod fixes a crash that occurs on modern systems at the end of Kasumi's loyalty mission, when returning to Normandy after defeating the boss.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. When the amount nears the crashing point (3.5GiB), it turns, yellow, red, then begins to flash red.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. When the amount nears the crashing point (3.5GiB), it turns, yellow, red, then begins to flash red. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. When the amount nears the crashing point (3.5GiB), it turns, yellow, red, then begins to flash red.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. When the amount nears the crashing point (3.5GiB), it turns, yellow, red, then begins to flash red.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. The interface can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL+T. Additionally, it shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. When the amount nears the crashing point (3.5GiB), it turns, yellow, red, then begins to flash red.

asimod.name: Death Counter LS
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI increments the number in a text file ever time the game over HUD is shown on screen. The file it produces is named 'deathcount.txt' and is placed next to the game executable. The count persists across sessions and can be used by things like OBS to show the death count.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: Combolution Support
asimod.author: 55tumbl
asimod.description: This ASI enables the full functionality of the DLC mod Combolutions. It also allows to switch between the Shared and Individual Cooldown systems (with adjusted cooldown durations), using the console commands "cooldown_s" and "cooldown_i", respectively.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) file for the game on game boot, as well as enable DLC file overrides.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) file for the game on game boot, as well as enable DLC file overrides.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) file for the game on game boot.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) files for the game on game boot.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) file for the game on game boot.

asimod.name: AutoTOC
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: This ASI will automatically calculate the Table of Contents (TOC) files for the game on game boot.

asimod.name: Autoload Enabler
asimod.author: d00t
asimod.description: This ASI enables the autoload.ini feature, which is a fairly critical component for LE1 DLC mods. Without this, DLC cannot fully mount.

asimod.name: Autoload Enabler
asimod.author: d00t/Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI enables the autoload.ini feature, which is a fairly critical component for LE1 DLC mods. Without this, DLC cannot fully mount. This version additionally registers TFC and ISB files for use by the game, so you can include these files in your DLC mod folder.

asimod.name: Autoload Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the autoload.ini feature, which is a fairly critical component for LE1 DLC mods. Without this, DLC cannot fully mount. This version registers TFC and ISB files for use by the game, so you can include these files in your DLC mod folder. It also will register startup files when declared as a GlobalPackage in Autoload.ini.

asimod.name: Autoload Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the autoload.ini feature, which is a critical component for LE1 DLC mods. Without this, DLC cannot fully mount. This version registers TFC and ISB files for use by the game, so you can include these files in your DLC mod folder. It also will register startup files when declared as a GlobalPackage in Autoload.ini. Use the console command 'profile autoload' to show what autoload data was loaded.

asimod.name: Controller Input Tester
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI opens a console window that logs controller inputs. You must install a controller mod or it will not output anything. This is only for testing if the game is seeing your controller inputs.

asimod.name: Autoload Enabler (Debug)
asimod.author: d00t
asimod.description: This ASI enables the autoload.ini feature, which is a fairly critical component for LE1 DLC mods. Without this, DLC cannot fully mount. This version adds a console command, 'profile autoload', which shows information about the loaded mods. It only works with the miniconsole (not the full one).

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It also includes the last touched BioTriggerStream. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum, and the text size scales based on the resolution of your screen. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It also shows the last touched BioTriggerStream, as well as the current and maximum amount of memory the process has used. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: henbagle
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: henbagle
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to its log file. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: henbagle
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: henbagle
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: SeqActLog Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
Prints the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Log sequence objects to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences. For full logs, install the m_objComment enabler mod from ME3Tweaks Dev Mods.
Toggle the on-screen messages with CTRL + G.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It also includes the last touched BioTriggerStream. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum, and the text size scales based on the resolution of your screen. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It also shows the last touched BioTriggerStream, as well as the current and maximum amount of memory the process has used. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Streaming Levels HUD
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI draws the list of streaming levels on the top left of the screen, as well as their current loaded state. It additionally shows the amount of memory the process is currently using, as well as as the maximum. The HUD can be toggled on and off by pressing CTRL + T.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to its log file. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to a file named KismetLog.txt. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: Kismet Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This plugin logs kismet sequence object activations to the console and to its log file. You can trace the execution of this log with Legendary Explorer's Sequence Editor.

asimod.name: LE1 LEX Interop
asimod.author: henbagle
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect (Legendary Edition) so tools such as Live Level Editor can be used. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE1 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect (Legendary Edition) so tools such as Live Level Editor can be used. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE1 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect (Legendary Edition) so tools such as Live Level Editor can be used. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE1 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect (Legendary Edition) so tools such as Live Level Editor can be used. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect (Legendary Edition), enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: 2DA Printer
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI dumps the loaded Bio2DA and Bio2DANumberedRows objects from memory to a file named '2DAPrintLog.txt', next to the game executable. To initiate the print, press CTRL + 2 when the main rendering interface is on screen (e.g, not during a prerendered video).

asimod.name: 2DA Printer
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI dumps the loaded Bio2DA and Bio2DANumberedRows objects from memory to a file named '2DAPrintLog.txt', next to the game executable. To initiate the print, press CTRL + 2 when the main rendering interface is on screen (e.g, not during a prerendered video).

asimod.name: Bio2DA Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI prints the loaded Bio2DA and Bio2DANumberedRows objects from memory to its log file. To initiate the print, press CTRL + 2 when the directions text is on screen at the top right.

asimod.name: PNG ScreenShots
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are named PNGLE1ScreenShot<Number>.png to help differentiate the source game.

asimod.name: PNG Screenshots
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are stored in a game-specific subdirectory of the ScreenShots folder.

asimod.name: PNG ScreenShots
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are named PNGLE2ScreenShot<Number>.png to help differentiate the source game.

asimod.name: PNG Screenshots
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are stored in a game-specific subdirectory of the ScreenShots folder.

asimod.name: PNG ScreenShots
asimod.author: Mgamerz
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are named PNGLE3ScreenShot<Number>.png to help differentiate the source game.

asimod.name: PNG Screenshots
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI makes screenshots (either through photo mode, or its backing console command 'screenshot') save as .png files instead of .bmp files. This saves significant disk space and makes them easier to share. Files are stored in a game-specific subdirectory of the ScreenShots folder.

asimod.name: LE1 Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.
Press CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to the log.

asimod.name: LE2 Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.
Press CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to the log.

asimod.name: LE3 Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.\n\nPress CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.
Press CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to a file named LE3LinkerPrinter.log, next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Linker Printer
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
This ASI internally tracks the file source of every object loaded into memory from disk. Objects with the same name already in memory are not loaded from disk; the in-memory version is used instead, which is a common problem due to asset duplication.
Press CTRL + O to log all loaded objects' sources to the log.

asimod.name: SSR Unlocker
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Screen Space Reflections (SSR) unlocker makes screen space reflections update every frame, rather than the default 30fps. This will improve realtime reflections at the cost of performance.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs the debug print from the game executable that can normally only be read with a debugger attached. This occassionally shows useful information, such as bad name index and entry indexes. The log is stored next to the game executable in a file named DebugLogger.txt.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI works logs all text written to the debug console (which the game does), as well as logs all imports that fail to resolve. Note that some imports failng to resolve are normal engine behavior due to how the game is compiled. The log is located in DebugLogger.txt next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs the debug print from the game executable that can normally only be read with a debugger attached. This occassionally shows useful information, such as bad name index and entry indexes. The log is stored next to the game executable in a file named DebugLogger.txt.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI works logs all text written to the debug console (which the game does), as well as logs all imports that fail to resolve. Note that some imports failng to resolve are normal engine behavior due to how the game is compiled. The log is located in DebugLogger.txt next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs the debug print from the game executable that can normally only be read with a debugger attached. This occassionally shows useful information, such as bad name index and entry indexes. The log is stored next to the game executable in a file named DebugLogger.txt.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI works logs all text written to the debug console (which the game does), as well as logs all imports that fail to resolve. Note that some imports failng to resolve are normal engine behavior due to how the game is compiled. The log is located in DebugLogger.txt next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: Debug Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI logs various things from the game that can be useful for development and debugging the game. It includes things such as error messages, some game crash scenarios, package loading, and failed imports. The log is stored in a file next to the game executable. To generate export creation logs, run the game with the -debugexportcreation command line parameter.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: SeqActLog Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
Prints the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Log sequence objects to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences. For full logs, install the m_objComment enabler mod from ME3Tweaks Dev Mods.
Toggle the on-screen messages with CTRL + G.

asimod.name: SeqAct_Log Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Will print the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Logs to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences.

asimod.name: SeqActLog Enabler
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description:
Prints the contents of SeqVars attached to SeqAct_Log sequence objects to the screen. Useful for debugging sequences. For full logs, install the m_objComment enabler mod from ME3Tweaks Dev Mods.
Toggle the on-screen messages with CTRL + G.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new console commands to Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new useful developer console commands to Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new console commands to Mass Effect 2 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new useful developer console commands to Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new console commands to Mass Effect 3 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new console commands to Mass Effect 3 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Console Extension
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: The Console Extension ASI adds new useful developer console commands to Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. See the source code link for the commands added by this ASI.

asimod.name: Hot Reload
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI makes LE2 open files with read/write sharing, rather than read-only sharing (no write). This allows you to modify packages on disk and easily reload them while the game is still running, something that both LE1 and LE3 do.

asimod.name: Hot Reload
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI makes LE2 open files with read/write sharing, rather than read-only sharing (no write). This allows you to modify packages on disk and easily reload them while the game is still running, something that both LE1 and LE3 do.

asimod.name: LE2 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE2, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE2 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE2, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE2 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE2, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect 2 (Legendary Edition), enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE3 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE3, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE3 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE3, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LE3 LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows LEX to communicate with LE3, enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: LEX Interop
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI allows Legendary Explorer to communicate with Mass Effect 3 (Legendary Edition), enabling tools such as Live Level Editor. This ASI does nothing on its own.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 2 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 2 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. DO NOT INSTALL THIS IF YOU DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE DOING, IT WILL CAUSE MASSIVE AMOUNTS OF DISK WRITES. Install and then review the log located next to the game executable. Uninstall when not tracing an error.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. This ASI will generate a very large amount of disk writes and use a very large amount of disk space - only install when trying to trace unrealscript calls.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. DO NOT INSTALL THIS IF YOU DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE DOING, IT WILL CAUSE MASSIVE AMOUNTS OF DISK WRITES. Install and then review the log located next to the game executable. Uninstall when not tracing an error.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. This ASI will generate a very large amount of disk writes and use a very large amount of disk space - only install when trying to trace unrealscript calls.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. DO NOT INSTALL THIS IF YOU DON'T KNOW WHAT YOU'RE DOING, IT WILL CAUSE MASSIVE AMOUNTS OF DISK WRITES. Install and then review the log located next to the game executable. Uninstall when not tracing an error.

asimod.name: Function Logger
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: Function Logger can be used to help trace the exact method call that crashed a game. This ASI will generate a very large amount of disk writes and use a very large amount of disk space - only install when trying to trace unrealscript calls.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 3 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Script Debugger
asimod.author: SirCxyrtyx
asimod.description: Enables using the Script Debugger tool in Legendary Explorer with Mass Effect 3 Legendary Edition. This allows you to pause the game and inspect variables for debugging.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files. For LE3 specifically, this also enables DLC mods to have multiple TFCs.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files. For LE3 specifically, this also enables DLC mods to have multiple TFCs.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files.

asimod.name: Texture Override
asimod.author: ME3Tweaks
asimod.description: This ASI enables the M3 Texture Override system, allowing texture replacement without modifying game files.
